content.en:
"Cultivating the Reincarnation Haotian Body, the other side of the Origin Ancestral Body Method, requires so many materials, and it is very rare!"

Ye Tian muttered.

If it were someone else, I was afraid that they would have to give up, after all, some treasures were rare enough to make many Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors unable to obtain them for countless years.

However, most of these resource treasures, Ye Tian already owned.

"In that Void Treasure Land of the Ruins of Reincarnation, there are many resources recorded above!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Previously, he had obtained these resource materials, but because they were not needed, he did not collect them in large quantities.

But now I find that those resources are now available.

Sure enough, any resource has its own uses, but for different Origin Realms.

However, he still lacks some resources and needs time to collect.

So, in the years that followed, he began to collect the remaining missing resources, and also collected them in that Void Treasure Land as much as possible to see if he could collect them.

Ye Tian used the resources on his body to constantly find a Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor to trade, even if he traded one, it would be very good.

In this way, one primeval epoch after another passed.

Gradually, more than half a million primeval years passed.

At this time, Ye Tian only had three resources left that had not yet been found.

【Reincarnation Xuantian Copper】

【Heavenly Spirit Flower on the Other Side】

【Void Mist Grass】

These three materials are resources that he has not yet gathered, and each of them is very rare, and almost only the ruins of reincarnation can obtain these three resources.

Although one of his replica bodies was also in the Void Treasure Land of the Ruins of Samsara , that Void Treasure Land did not have these three materials, unless he went to other places in the Ruins of Samsara Treasure.

But once he comes out of the Void Treasure Land, he will inevitably be discovered by the Desolate Blood Ancestor, and then he will be exposed.

Therefore, he must now find another way to enter the ruins of reincarnation, without restrictions.

this day.

Ye Tian finally found a way to freely enter the ruins of reincarnation.

......

Somewhere in the middle.

Ye Tian met with the Lord of the Cold Star.

He had traded with the Lord of the Cold Stars, and the two knew each other.

This time, he found the Lord of the Cold Star, and the Lord of the Cold Star was willing to help him.

"Endless Lord, when we first met, you were only a Origin Middle Realm cultivator, but I didn't expect that you would now be a top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor!"

"Lord of the Cold Star, you said before that there is a way for me to enter the ruins of reincarnation, but it is not the method of the Ancient Heavenly Palace!"

If he goes through the channel of the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace, he will have to be monitored by the Desolate Ancient Heavenly Palace with the Desolate Ancient Bead, and he can only go to that Void Treasure Land, and there is no way to leave without permission, that method is useless.

The Lord of the Cold Stars smiled: "Don't worry, I can naturally let you move freely after entering the ruins of reincarnation, but you have to think clearly, once you enter the ruins of reincarnation, it is very dangerous." The ruins of reincarnation have many reincarnation creatures comparable to the overlords of the Origin Upper Realm, and I don't dare to enter the ruins of reincarnation and wander casually. "

"Lord of the Cold Stars, security issues, don't worry, I have my own ideas. Ye Tiandao.

The Lord of the Cold Star didn't worry about Ye Tian, even if Ye Tian died, it had nothing to do with him, he just reminded him kindly.

"Lord of Endless, if you want to enter the Lord of Reincarnation, I can use the quota of our Town Heaven Boundary City to let you pass, but I need the cold gold of the other side, if you can still take out so much cold gold from the other side last time, I will help you enter. "Lord of the Cold Stars.

"Do you want the cold gold on the other side?"

Ye Tian guessed that the Lord of the Cold Star must have failed to cultivate the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side, and the amount of cold gold on the other side was not enough, so he needed to collect the cold gold on the other side.

"Okay, I promise!"

Ye Tian said.

Then, he said goodbye to the Lord of the Cold Stars, and then used the same method to enter the Jackdaw Abyss to collect the cold gold on the other side.

After a while, he gathered enough cold gold from the other side to find the Lord of the Cold Star again.

"Lord of the Cold Stars, these cold gold on the other side can let me go to the ruins of reincarnation, right?"

Ye Tian took out the cold gold on the other side and asked.

"Absolutely!"

The Lord of the Cold Stars is in a good mood.

He was very curious, where did Ye Tian get so much cold gold from the other side, could it be that he had newly discovered a treasure land containing the cold gold of the other side?

He really wanted to know the location of that treasure land, but Ye Tian was also a top-level Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor now, and he couldn't deal with Ye Tian.

Zhen Heaven Realm City could easily wipe out Ye Tian, but he couldn't dispatch the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of Zhen Heaven Realm City!

Moreover, even if Ye Tian was caught, Ye Tian would not necessarily reveal it, and he still dispelled this idea.

Subsequently.

The Lord of the Cold Star took Ye Tian to Zhentian Realm City.

......

Town Heaven Boundary City.

This is also a top overlord-level force that belongs to the same level as the Ancient Heavenly Palace, and its strength is almost the same.

Soon.

Ye Tian followed the Lord of the Cold Star to an entrance to the ruins of reincarnation.

The Lord of the Cold Stars went to apply for access to the ruins of reincarnation and went through the formalities.

After a while, the Lord of the Cold Star took a token and handed it to Ye Tian: "Endless Lord, this Zhentian Realm Abyss Order can allow you to enter the ruins of reincarnation, and it will not be stopped by our Zhentian Boundary City, and you can also come back directly through the entrance after you come back." However, it can only be used once. "

"Thank you!"

After Ye Tian received the Zhentian Realm Yuan Order, he thanked him.

Subsequently.

He passed through the entrance of the ruins of reincarnation with the Zhentian Realm Abyss Order in his hand and entered the ruins of reincarnation.

As soon as he entered the ruins of reincarnation, he stayed away from here and began to shuttle in one direction at random.

After a distance, he stopped.

"Copy the body right here, and if it falls, you can continue to copy the body!"

Ye Tian didn't care if it was dangerous here, so he quickly copied his body.

It didn't take long for a replica body to be copied.

After that, the two replica bodies are moved separately, and whichever replica body finds a suitable safe location can be used as a long-term retreat site.

Abrupt.

A reincarnation ruin creature appears and attacks Ye Tian.

【Reincarnation Strange Cicada】

The speed of this reincarnation monster cicada is very fast, and its strength is equivalent to that of a powerful Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

For Ye Tian, the strength of this reincarnation cicada is naturally not worth mentioning.

Ye Tian was holding a high-level supreme treasure spear and killed it very easily.

Although the creatures of the ruins of reincarnation are not very dense, and only one of the creatures of the ruins of reincarnation will be encountered occasionally, but each of the creatures of the ruins of reincarnation is very powerful, and if you are unlucky, it will be troublesome to encounter a creature of reincarnation that is comparable to the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm.

Soon.

Ye Tian found a piece of ruins, which was quite safe, so he hid in the ruins alone.
